ASPECTSCOLORLESS-LUNARI_CHARM_POWER.desc: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] that deals damage with the same parity as the cost of this card, refund its cost.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-LUNARI_CHARM_POWER.smar: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] that deals {Amount:choose(1|2):odd|even} damage, refund its cost.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-THE_RUNE_POWER.title: The Rune
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-THE_RUNE_POWER.descript: Whenever you gain [gold]Energy[/gold] during your turn, draw 1 card.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-THE_RUNE_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you gain [gold]Energy[/gold] during your turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card{Amount:plural:|s}.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-GIFT_POWER.title: Gift
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-GIFT_POWER.description: When this enemy is attacked 3 times in one turn, add copies of the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] cards to the attacker's [gold]Hand[/gold].
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-GIFT_POWER.smartDescrip: This gift containing [blue]{CardNames}[/blue] needs [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more attack{Amount:plural:|s} to open.
